home_headline: Accessible healthcare, reimagined for modern India
home_subheading: Book trusted doctors, chat with our AI assistant, and manage your health journey in one secure place.
about_content: HealHub delivers AI-assisted healthcare support with fast appointment booking, doctor discovery, and secure patient engagement for individuals and families.

testimonials.text: The booking experience was incredibly smooth and the AI assistant was very helpful.

testimonials.text: I found it easy to connect with a specialist and manage my health follow-ups.
